creator: sh+freebsd-bugzilla@codevoid.de
text:
Created attachment 193440
sacc v1.0 svn diff

Hello,

I would like to add net/sacc to the ports tree.

Sacc is a simple and (meanwhile) very stable and usable gopher client. I haven't seen any major bugs in the last months, while I'm using it almost daily. I'm also in contact with the author.

Best Regards,
Stefan
